'^([a-zA-Z0-9]|[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\\-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])(\\.([a-zA-Z0-9]|[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\\-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9]))*$', ], 'ValidIPAddress' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'pattern' => => [ 'volumeName' => [ 'shape' => 'VolumeName', ], 'volumeType' => [ 'shape' => 'VolumeType', ], ], ], 'VolumeName' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 63, 'min' => 3, 'pattern' => 'urn' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 255, 'min' => 1, 'pattern' => '^[A-Za-z0-9._\\-:\\/#\\+]+$', ], ],];
